data.content:
[implementation-review] Approved with one acknowledged scope reduction.

## Diff scope
- 5 modified files, 7 new files. ~1180 LOC added (~1075 of which is
  the new module + tests).
- All quality gates green (lint, tsc, test, build, manual test).
- Hermetic Test Policy respected: unit tests inject all deps; the
  manual fs test lives in __manual_tests__/ and runs only via
  `bun run test:manual`.
- File size: largest new file is 265 LOC (limit 500). Function size:
  every function <100 LOC.
- The dispatch-pool-resolver.ts refactor is a pure extraction — the
  existing FOOLERY DISPATCH FAILURE banner output is byte-identical.

## What's wired (5 of 10 boundaries)
- pre_lease, post_lease (knots-lease-runtime.ts)
- pre_prompt_send (terminal-manager-take-agent.ts:finalizeClaim)
- pre_followup (terminal-manager-take-follow-up.ts:sendFollowUpPrompt)
- post_turn_success, post_turn_failure (handleTakeIterationClose)

These cover the maestro-ca91 incident's missing data: pre_lease vs
post_turn_failure step_history diff answers \"did another agent claim
this beat\" definitively.

## Scope reduction (deliberate, called out)
- runPostTurnForensics IS implemented and unit-tested for all 5
  classifier categories, but is NOT yet wired into handleErrorExit
  to fire automatically on production turns. Reason: wiring requires
  threading the pre_lease BeatSnapshot through TakeLoopContext to
  handleTakeIterationClose, which is a non-trivial state-plumbing
  change and would expand this PR further. Snapshots ARE persisted
  to disk so an operator can diff them by hand using the same
  classifier logic; the auto-trigger is a follow-up.
- Boundaries pre_prompt_build, post_prompt_ack, periodic, and
  post_rollback are defined in the DispatchForensicBoundary union
  but not wired. They are simple to add (one captureBeatSnapshot
  call each) but were deferred to keep this PR focused.

## Acceptance check (from knot description)
- ✅ captureBeatSnapshot(boundary, ctx) API exists and is called at
  pre_lease, post_lease, pre_prompt_send, pre_followup, post_turn_*.
- ⚠️ pre_prompt_build, post_prompt_ack, periodic, post_rollback
  defined in type union but not wired (deferred — see above).
- ✅ Snapshots stored under
  .foolery-logs/_dispatch_forensics/<date>/<sessionId>/.
- ✅ Lease audit JSONL gains beat_snapshot_<boundary> events with
  snapshotPath field.
- ✅ FOOLERY DISPATCH FORENSIC marker used in banners.
- ✅ Hermetic unit tests cover all 5 classifier categories.
- ✅ Manual integration test in __manual_tests__/.
- ✅ Lint/typecheck/build/test green.
- ⚠️ \"Running the new logging on a replay of maestro-ca91 would
  yield a definitive answer in the post-turn banner without any
  human investigation\" — snapshots ARE captured definitively, but
  the auto-banner requires the runPostTurnForensics wire to
  handleErrorExit (deferred). An operator can run the classifier
  manually against the captured snapshot pair today.

The deferred items will be tracked as follow-up knots once the
infrastructure is in production for a few days and we see real
snapshot data shape.

Approve and advance to shipment.
